description: Add GitHub Actions CI workflow and fix stale snarktank flowchart URL in README

finalSuccessCriteria.description: Ralph CLI documentation is clearer for install/run/setup, and the repository has GitHub Actions CI that runs the available test or verification commands for the CLI and related packages.
acceptanceCriteria: Repository documentation clearly explains the current install, setup, skill, and run workflows without stale two-skill or npm-placeholder confusion
Documentation describes the Node CLI path and manual shell script path accurately
A GitHub Actions workflow exists under .github/workflows and runs the repository's available unit-test or verification commands
The CI workflow covers the CLI package verification commands
If no true unit tests exist yet, the workflow documents and runs the strongest available checks such as typecheck and build
All configured local verification commands pass

planning.currentObjective: Add GitHub Actions CI workflow for CLI typecheck + build, and fix stale snarktank.github.io flowchart URL in README

prdChain.objective: Explore current docs and test/build commands, then record a plan for docs cleanup and GitHub Actions CI
prdChain.notes: Exploration complete; developer recorded findings and next slice recommendations in progress.txt.

prdChain.objective: Add GitHub Actions CI workflow for CLI typecheck + build, and fix stale snarktank flowchart URL in README

userStories.title: Add GitHub Actions CI workflow
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs the CLI package's strongest available verification commands (typecheck and build) on every push and pull request so that regressions are caught automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow triggers on push and pull_request to all branches
Workflow job runs: cd cli && npm ci && npm run typecheck && npm run build
Workflow comments note that no unit tests exist yet; typecheck and build are the strongest checks available
npm run typecheck and npm run build both pass locally before committing
Committed with message: feat: add GitHub Actions CI workflow

userStories.title: Fix stale snarktank.github.io flowchart URL in README
userStories.description: As a user reading the README, I want the flowchart link to point to the current GitHub Pages deployment so that clicking the link works.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md flowchart image link and 'View Interactive Flowchart' text link are updated from snarktank.github.io/ralph to samchung95.github.io/ralph-cli
The Claude Code marketplace plugin identifier (snarktank/ralph on line ~131) is left unchanged as it is the correct marketplace identifier
No other unintentional snarktank references remain in README.md
Committed with message: docs: fix stale flowchart URL
userStories.notes: README.md flowchart image and 'View Interactive Flowchart' links updated to samchung95.github.io/ralph-cli; marketplace identifier snarktank/ralph left unchanged.
